title: Kids Create Sequins In Assorted Colours & Shapes Reusable Pouch Ages 3+
features: Pouch of sequins in assorted colours & shapes
Sequins come in a fully reusable bag
Allow your child's imagination to run wild as they embrace their creative side
Great for children's home, arts & crafts projects
description: Large pack of sequins in a range of colours & shapes in a reuseable pouch. Perfect for all art and crafts, ideal for school & home use. You can be assured that your child will have lots of hours of fun and creativity with this set.
